title: User preference for Orbit agent settings

enabled.description: Killswitch for all Orbit functionality. When false, all Orbit subsettings are ignored.

orbit_agent_enabled.description: Whether the standalone Orbit agent is enabled for this user. Only applies when enabled is true.

orbit_agentic_chat_enabled.description: Whether Orbit tools are available in agentic chat for this user. Only applies when enabled is true.

orbit_other_foundational_agents_enabled.description: Whether Orbit tools are available in non-chat foundational agents for this user. Only applies when enabled is true.

orbit_custom_agents_enabled.description: Whether Orbit tools are available in user-built custom agents for this user. Only applies when enabled is true.
